description: Product Description DERMA V10 ANTI-AGEING EYE CREAM Directions Wet the sponge before use. Squeeze out excess water. Use the sponge to pick up and blend makeup products. After use, rinse and squeeze out excess water. Allow the sponge to air dry. Repeat cleaning process to extend the sponge's lifespan.
